name: Holiday Tuna Tree
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray an appropriate 4-cup mold with Pam; the example was done in a small Christmas tree mold.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and tuna.
3. Add remaining ingredients and stir well.
4. Place in mold and refrigerate until set.
5. Unmold onto a serving plate. For a Christmas tree mold, decorate with garlands of small parsley leaves, pieces of red and green pepper cut into stars, and a lemon wedge.
